name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose Marietta, Georgia — Loan For Any Purpose offers same-day cash advances, payday loans, title loans, and personal loans up to $50K at...
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose operates a physical lending location at 3403 Grand River Ave in Detroit, Michigan, open Monday-Friday 7am-8pm and Saturday-Sunday 9am-6pm. The company positions itself as a quick-cash lender targeting consumers with urgent financial needs across multiple loan products and credit profiles. They explicitly welcome all credit types and emphasize same-day or rapid funding timelines as core selling points. The company maintains a secondary corporate address in Atlanta, Georgia, and operates an online application process alongside in-person lending.

The company offers a diverse portfolio of loan products including cash advances (under $1,000), payday loans (up to $1,000), title loans secured by vehicle equity (up to $50,000), installment loans ($1,000-$5,000), bad credit loans ($250-$50,000), and personal loans (up to $50,000). All products are marketed as unsecured or secured depending on type, with emphasis on approval speed and minimal documentation requirements. They explicitly state their loans are designed to meet short-term financial needs, not long-term borrowing solutions.

Loan For Any Purpose distinguishes itself through its physical retail presence combined with online application options, extensive product range serving different loan amounts and credit profiles, and stated commitment to serving borrowers with poor or no credit history. The company prominently displays operating hours and a local phone number (313-228-3440) to facilitate in-person visits. Their marketing emphasizes accessibility and speed as primary differentiators in the alternative lending market.

The company provides appropriate regulatory disclosures regarding credit approval variability, loan term variations by state, and non-FICO impact of applications. However, specific APR/rate information, exact fees, and approval timelines are not disclosed on the website. The vague language around "rates, terms, fees, and availability vary by state and applicant" means borrowers cannot comparison-shop before applying. The recommendation to seek credit counseling for those with ongoing difficulties suggests the company views itself as emergency rather than solution-focused lending.
address: 2359 Windy Hill Rd SE, Marietta, GA 30067

company_info.headquarters: 2359 Windy Hill Rd SE, Marietta, GA 30067

pros: Physical retail location in Detroit open 7 days per week for in-person applications and consultations
Explicit statement that all credit types welcome, including bad credit borrowers
Loan amounts available up to $50,000 for title and personal loans, higher than typical payday lenders
Same-day loan products explicitly offered with minimum documentation requirements
Title loans available secured by vehicle equity, providing option for larger borrowed amounts
Multiple loan products (6+ types) allowing consumers to choose product matching their need amount
Online application option available in addition to in-person lending
cons: No APR, interest rates, or specific fees disclosed on website; borrowers cannot comparison-shop before applying
Vague statement that rates/terms/fees 'vary by state and applicant' obscures actual cost to consumer
Company explicitly states loans are short-term only and recommends credit counseling for ongoing credit problems, suggesting products may worsen financial position
Operating as emergency lender rather than debt solution provider indicates high-cost, high-risk lending model
No transparency on typical approval timelines despite 'same-day' marketing; website notes verification may add 'up to two business days'
best_for: Consumers needing under $1,000 in emergency cash within 24 hours with poor or no credit history
Vehicle owners with equity seeking larger loan amounts ($5,000-$50,000) via title collateral
Detroit residents preferring in-person lending with ability to visit physical location during operating hours
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for consumers in Detroit needing emergency cash within 24 hours who have poor credit or cannot qualify for traditional bank loans. Primary caveat: the website discloses no APR, fees, or terms, making it impossible to assess true cost before applying; combined with explicit positioning as short-term emergency lending only, this suggests high-cost products that should only be used for genuine emergencies, not ongoing financial management.
services: Title loans secured by vehicle title (up to $50,000)
In-person lending at physical retail location
